title: Verify existing implementation of health check endpoint
description: Health check endpoint GET /api/health already exists at src/app/api/health/route.ts with full test coverage in route.test.ts. Implementation returns status 'ok', uptime, and ISO timestamp with proper JSON headers.
existing_patterns: src/app/api/health/route.ts uses NextRequest/Response pattern with JSON serialization
src/app/api/health/route.test.ts uses vitest with fake timers for deterministic testing
